expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Если я правильно понял, проблема в том, что тесты проходили вчера...'

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks about pattern of failures — one area or scattered

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: No fixes proposed — only diagnostic questions

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: Explains why the pattern matters: one area = dependency, scattered = environment

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: One main question about failure pattern, one lightweight follow-up about error messages
